seoTitle: Ocean Vista vs Oldina — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ocean Vista and Oldina. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ocean Vista vs Oldina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ocean Vista and Oldina.
heading: Ocean Vista vs Oldina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ocean Vista, Tasmania and Oldina, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oldina has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ocean Vista (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ocean Vista or Oldina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ocean Vista has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Oldina scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ocean Vista scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Oldina scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ocean Vista or Oldina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oldina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
